decisions.decision: Strategy behaviour is always synchronous (apply/3 + priority/0)
decisions.rationale: Simple, predictable. Summarization blocks until complete.

decisions.decision: Strategy receives messages + context map (not full conversation)
decisions.rationale: Keeps strategies composable. Context has model, provider, token_counter, etc.

decisions.decision: Token counting is provider-dispatched via TokenCounter behaviour
decisions.rationale: Extensible, correct per-provider. Default uses bytes/4 heuristic.

decisions.decision: System messages are auto-pinned, manual pinned: boolean field added
decisions.rationale: System prompts always preserved. Any message can be manually pinned.
System resolves conflicts (pinned always wins). Presets for easy start.

decisions.decision: Summarization provider/model configurable with fallback to conversation settings
decisions.rationale: Use cheap model for summarization, expensive model for main conversation.
Unblocks Phase 6 Cost Tracking. Response.usage now returns %PhoenixAI.Usage{}.

next_action: Phase 3 is COMPLETE (133 tests, 7/7 UAT passed, code review done). Next: /gsd:discuss-phase 4 (Long-Term Memory) or /gsd:plan-phase 4
context_notes: Phases 1-3 complete. Phase 2 was absorbed by Phase 1. 133 tests total. Postgres container 'phoenix_ai_store_postgres' on port 5434. All code review issues resolved for both phases. PhoenixAI upgraded to 0.2.0 with Usage struct.
